name: French School Jakarta

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Cipete Dalam No. 32, Cipete Selatan, Jakarta Selatan 12410, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: The word among francophone expat families is that FSJ is the obvious choice if you want your children educated in the French system.
paragraphs: The word among francophone expat families is that FSJ is the obvious choice if you want your children educated in the French system.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$5.9K – US$12K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Campus in Cipete, Air-conditioned classrooms, Library and documentation centres, Outdoor pavilion, School restaurant.

metaDescription: French School Jakarta (South Jakarta). The word among francophone expat families is that FSJ is the obvious choice if you want your children educated in the French system.…
